ground_truth.title: Electrician in Salt Lake City | 24/7 Electrical Services
ground_truth.main_content:
Expert Electricians in Salt Lake City, UT

Need a residential electrician in Salt Lake City? When hiring a professional, you deserve nothing less than the best. You want a licensed electrical contractor with the skills and knowledge to meet the requirements of your project. You need SameDay Heating & Air, Plumbing, and Electrical.

Call (801) 726-3329 today to schedule electrical installation, repair, or replacement in Salt Lake City.

Our Electrical Services

We’re proud to provide high-end electrical services to our residential customers in the Salt Lake City area. Rely on our licensed electricians for:

Electrical repair: You rely on electricity more than you realize. If your outlets stop working, light switches feel hot, or light bulbs flicker, SameDay can provide the electrical repair you need. We’re a 24-hour electrician, so you can count on us for emergency electrical service any time of day or night.

Electrical installation: Electricity isn’t something to be trifled with. If you want to install a new outlet or light switch, whole-house surge protector, generator, or high-efficiency appliance, let our experienced electricians handle the job.

Electrical replacement: Want to update your ceiling fans, replace the bathroom light fixture, or upgrade your breaker panel? The knowledgeable team at SameDay has you covered.

Our residential electricians can repair, install, and replace a wide range of electrical components. Call us for any of these services:

Whole-house surge protection
Hot tub services
Indoor/outdoor lighting installation
Light switch repair, replacement, and installation
Outlet repair, replacement, and installation
Appliance installation
Electrical circuit services
Wiring repair, replacement, and installation
Electric meter repair
And more

Call us today to speak with our electricians in Salt Lake City. No matter what electrical challenges you have, we can quickly and efficiently resolve the issue.

Signs You Need Electrical Repair

Electrical systems are comprised of an intricate network of wiring, switches, and outlets. Issues are often tied to a faulty breaker panel.

As the hub of your home’s electrical wiring, the breaker panel is responsible for distributing electricity through multiple circuits to power lights, appliances, and devices plugged into the wall. Watch for these signs that your electrical panel is failing or your wiring needs repair:

Frequently tripping circuit breakers
Flickering, dimming, or buzzing lights
The need for excessive extension cords
Sparks or arcing when plugging in appliances
Electric shock upon unplugging devices
Discolored, loose, or warm outlets
A burning odor coming from your outlets

A malfunctioning electrical system could be dangerous. Protect your family and reduce the risk of fire — call a SameDay electrician at (801) 726-3329 for 24/7 electrical repair.

Whole-Home Generator Services

In Salt Lake City, UT, residents understand the importance of being prepared for power disruptions. SameDay’s comprehensive installment and replacement of whole-home generators are designed to keep your home powered and secure, even during unexpected power failures.

Benefits of Whole Home Generators

Whole-home generators are an essential solution for maintaining a seamless power supply during such interruptions. These systems offer a range of benefits, ensuring that your home remains a safe and functional haven, regardless of external power conditions.

Here’s how a whole-home generator can make a significant difference:

Uninterrupted power: Keep your home’s essential systems running smoothly during outages.
Enhanced safety: Eliminate the risks associated with portable generators.
Tailored solutions: Our team will help you find a generator that perfectly matches your home’s energy needs.

Why Contact SameDay for Electrical Services in Salt Lake City?

If you want access to the finest products and customer service available, choose SameDay as your electrician in Salt Lake City. We’re dedicated to meeting your needs without fail and even offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee for your peace of mind.

Check out our testimonials to see what our satisfied customers have to say about us. Thanks to our professional work and 65 years of experience, you can trust us to get your lights, switches, and outlets functioning safely and reliably again.

Don’t wait until an electrical problem leaves you in the dark — trust the licensed residential electricians at SameDay to perform your electrical repair, installation, or replacement.

Call us today at (801) 726-3329 to schedule services in Salt Lake City.
